title: smallhold: client_secret compared with ==
description: In /home/mark/PROJECT/smallhold/src/api.rs lines 621-623, the client_secret from the OAuth token exchange is compared using Rust's == operator (via *cs \!= stored_secret), which is not constant-time. An attacker could use timing side-channels to brute-force the client_secret byte by byte. Should use a constant-time comparison function (e.g., subtle::ConstantTimeEq or ring::constant_time::verify_slices_are_equal) instead.
